title: How Senior Engineers Actually Build with AI in 2026 | Build a Full Stack Job Applications Platform
summary: JavaScript Mastery tutorial on building a full-stack AI job application platform called JobPilot using AI agents and context files. The video covers workflow practices for shipping production projects with AI without agent drift, integrating services like InsForge for auth, Browserbase for web scraping, PostHog for analytics, and Adzuna for job discovery.
